Instance Method# removeObserver(_:)

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+visionOS 2.0+watchOS 11.0+

```
func removeObserver(_ observer: any LAEnvironment.Observer)
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/localauthentication/laenvironment/removeobserver(_:)#discussion)

Removes the previously registered observer.

If the observer is deallocated, it will be removed automatically.
